name: Sausage'n Egg Brunch Special
recipeIngredient: 12 oz frozen shredded hash brown potatoes, thawed
recipeInstructions:
1. Preheat oven to 350 degrees Fahrenheit.
2. Combine the potatoes, sour cream, milk, cheese, and chives in a medium bowl.
3. Spoon the mixture into a buttered shallow 2-quart rectangular casserole dish.
4. Bake for 40 minutes.
5. Cut the sausage into halves lengthwise, then cut crosswise into bite-sized pieces.
6. Arrange the sausage pieces down the center of the casserole.
7. Bake for an additional 10 to 12 minutes or until the eggs reach your desired doneness.
8. Serve immediately.
